title: hephaestus-9up-rerender-nbpro
prompt: Re-render a 9-panel storyboard board, clean. THREE references (house grammar): IMAGE 1 = original STYLE reference — BORROW its clean painterly concept-art style, palette, brushwork, finish; DO NOT BORROW its composition. IMAGE 2 = a clean storyboard render of this same world — BORROW its smooth, clean rendering quality. IMAGE 3 = the 9-panel storyboard board to REPRODUCE — BORROW its exact 3x3 panel layout and the shot/content of all nine panels (the bearded blond smith Hephaestus, the gold automata, the forge); DO NOT BORROW its grain, noise, or gritty surface. Reproduce IMAGE 3's nine panels faithfully — same shots, same composition, same character and automata — but render every panel CLEAN and smooth in the style of Images 1 and 2. Keep the clean 3x3 grid with thin borders and the small panel number labels.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Render in clean, smooth, finished painterly concept-art — cool blue/violet shadow, warm gold, orange spark-light, volumetric haze; intentional brushwork, no grain or noise. Reproduce the target board's layout and content faithfully.
